title: Oregon: Oregon Consumer Privacy Act (OCPA) deletion & opt-out
summary: Oregon residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising, including through a recognized universal opt-out signal. Oregon also lets you request a list of the specific third parties that received your data — useful for finding where to follow up. The OCPA took effect on July 1, 2024.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
